title: Title
titlePlaceholder: My organization, my festival, my city, other
contribType: Who can add events to this calendar ?
contribDefaultStatePublishedText: You can edit the events later.
contribDefaultStateUnpublishedText: Events become public only after your validation.
slug.invalid: Only lowercase letters, digits and dashes (-) are allowed
contribUseFields: Invite members to present themselves (organization, phone, name, title, email)
removeAgendaWarning: Are you sure you want to remove this agenda ?
description.tooManyLines: The description must not exceed 4 lines
requestOfficialDescription:
In order to guide the re-users of the events published on OpenAgenda, we have set up a control of the agendas one by one, in order to grant them an "official" label, in order to certify that it is indeed authentic programming, edited by the organizer himself. This excludes test agendas.

A blue icon appears next to the agenda name.

To be recognized as an official agenda, you have to
indexedAgendaDesc: Index the agenda in the search engines (The index will be updated after a while)
removeKeyWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this key?
contribModerateOnChangeBy: Status of an event after modification
contribModerateOnChangeByUnpublish: Unpublish the event so that it is checked again
consigneSubLabel: The guideline appears at the beginning of the event entry form
GDPRInformationSubLabel: Modify the text presented to members informing them of the usage made of their personal information
contributionMessageCompleteSubLabel: Appears when the contributor has submitted their contribution
contributionMessagePublicationSubLabel: Sent to the contributor when his event has been published
enableMailtoDesc: Disable email: Replace inbox links with email
mailtoEmailDesc: A link "mailto" pointing to this email will be present on the pages of the agenda.
matomoAskForConsentInfo: My Matomo configurationg requires asking for consent
matomoCustomConfig: I want to use a particular Matomo configuration.
trackSelectPlaceholder: Choose your tracking service (Google Analytics or Matomo)
googleAnalyticsInfo: To create a new secret, navigate in the Google Analytics UI to: Admin > Data Streams > choose your stream > Measurement Protocol > Create
statsDescription: Follow the crowds of visitors on the public pages of your agenda on openagenda.com
labTabDescription: Use the features available in beta version
eventStatusDesc: Activate event status controls (cancelled, full, rescheduled...)
